brief: Mid-size fashion retailer (~30 SKUs) on Magento 1.9. Migrate to Shopify Plus, redesign the storefront with a more editorial feel, integrate Klaviyo for email and Yotpo for reviews. Budget $80k, target launch in 3 months. Two-person internal marketing team will own the platform after launch and needs onboarding.
notes: Migration with explicit integrations, training implied.

brief: B2B SaaS company (devops tooling) needs a brand refresh: new logo, type system, color palette, illustration library, and a refreshed marketing site (~12 pages on Webflow). No backend work. Budget ~$40k, 10 weeks. Marketing team will maintain the Webflow site post-launch.
notes: Pure design + Webflow build, no custom dev.

brief: Early-stage health startup wants a native iOS MVP for medication tracking. Core flows: onboarding, add medication with reminders, daily check-in, weekly summary. No Android in v1. Stripe-backed paywall after 14-day trial. Backend on Firebase. Targeting TestFlight in 12 weeks, App Store launch shortly after. Budget ~$120k.
notes: Native mobile build with paywall and backend.

brief: Enterprise consulting firm's current site is a slow WordPress build from 2018. Rebuild on Next.js + a headless CMS (Sanity), preserve all 80+ existing URLs for SEO, modernize the design, and add a case-study filtering experience. 14 weeks, ~$95k. Editorial team currently uses WordPress and will need to learn Sanity.
notes: URL preservation = SEO redirect strategy required.

brief: Mid-market legal tech company wants a 6-month organic search push: technical SEO audit on existing site, keyword and topic research, then production of 24 long-form articles and 6 landing pages targeting bottom-funnel queries. No site rebuild. Internal content lead exists but capacity is limited. Budget $60k.
notes: Strategy + content; no build phase per se but still has discovery and QA.

brief: Logistics company needs an internal admin dashboard to replace a tangle of spreadsheets used by their ops team (15 users). Read/write to existing Postgres warehouse, role-based access, audit log, exports to CSV. They mentioned Retool but are open to a custom React app. 8 weeks, $35k. Power users will train the rest of the team internally.
notes: Internal tool, small user base, internal training so no formal training task required.

brief: Series B company wants to consolidate marketing data into a Snowflake warehouse: ingest from HubSpot, Stripe, Mixpanel, and Google Ads via Fivetran; build a unified customer model in dbt; ship a starter set of Looker dashboards (acquisition, retention, MRR). 12 weeks, $90k. Analytics team will own dbt models after launch.

Professional services firm wants to roll out HubSpot Sales + Service Hubs to replace a homegrown CRM. Migrate ~12k contact records, configure pipelines for three service lines, set up ticketing and SLAs, and integrate with their billing system (FreshBooks). 10 weeks, $50k. Sales team and support team will both need training.
notes: CRM rollout with two distinct user groups to train.

brief: Media company on a heavily-customized WordPress (1500+ articles, custom post types, ad slots, paywalls) wants to move to a headless setup: keep WordPress as the editor for now but render the public site from Next.js. Preserve URLs, ad integrations (GAM), and paywall logic (Piano). 16 weeks, $130k.
notes: Heavy migration, ad tech, paywall — many integration risks.

brief: Existing fitness iOS app (SwiftUI) wants to add a social feed: friends list, activity sharing, comments, push notifications. Backend is Ruby on Rails, currently exposing a JSON API. 8 weeks, $45k. No Android version yet, no training needed since the app team is in-house.
notes: Feature addition to existing app, no training.

brief: Government services portal (React SPA, ~40 distinct screens) needs WCAG 2.2 AA conformance. Start with an accessibility audit, then prioritize and remediate over 10 weeks. Final report must hold up to an external audit. Budget $55k.
notes: Audit-driven remediation; the report itself is a deliverable.

brief: Ops team at a 200-person SaaS wants a Slack bot that surfaces on-call status, lets engineers acknowledge PagerDuty alerts in-channel, and posts a daily incident digest. PagerDuty API and Datadog API are both in scope. 6 weeks, $25k. Internal engineers will maintain it.
notes: Small integration project, no training (engineers maintain).
